hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if printf "%s\n" "$cmd" | grep -qE "(^|[;&|[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)"; then if printf "%s\n" "$cmd" | grep -qiE "co-authored-by:.*claude|co-authored-by:.*anthropic|generated with.*claude|noreply@anthropic\.com|claude\.ai/code"; then echo "Blocked: commit message contains Claude/Anthropic self-attribution (e.g. Co-Authored-By: Claude, Generated with Claude Code, noreply@anthropic.com, or a claude.ai link). Remove the self-attribution line from the commit message and recommit." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
